assumptions: Quick-load domain packs should stay concise and constraint-focused.
Detailed anti-pattern guidance should live in canonical deep references rather than duplicated across multiple packs.
capture_summary: Added one concise engineering-quality invariant against compatibility shims, inferred-state recovery, and monkeypatch-only seams when explicit contracts or injectable collaborators exist.
Added detailed clean-code guidance for scoping compatibility behavior to explicit migration paths and preferring fakeable collaborators over brittle monkeypatching.
Added iterative-loop doctrine requiring eval/resume/status flows to reject missing continuity state and migration flows to fail on malformed or ambiguous retained artifacts instead of guessing.
